description_long: This is a tall, rectangular cabinet structure with a combination of white and wood-textured surfaces. The front features a vertical wooden panel with a built-in bench and a lower compartment, which appears to house a front-loading washing machine. The side and back panels are solid white, providing a clean, modern look and structural support. The wood-textured surfaces are likely laminate or veneer, giving a warm, natural appearance to the seating and storage areas. The upper section of the cabinet has open slots and cutouts, possibly for additional storage or access. The overall design suggests it is intended for use in a utility or laundry area, offering both seating and appliance integration.
description: A tall, modern cabinet with white sides and wood-textured front, featuring a bench and integrated washing machine compartment. Designed for utility or laundry spaces, it combines seating and appliance storage.
description_view_0: The left side view shows a solid white panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the wood-textured bench, vertical panel, and compartment for a washing machine, highlighting the main interactive features.
description_view_2: The right side view displays the wood-textured bench and the front-loading washing machine, partially enclosed by the white side panel.
description_view_3: The back view consists of a plain, solid white panel with no visible features or openings.
